segments.text: Alright, approaching with nair into a down tilt!
segments.original_text: さあ空中ニュートラル差し込みからの下強攻撃

segments.text: Steadily racking up damage with forward tilt to push them out!
segments.original_text: ダメージを着実に稼いで横強で追い出す

segments.text: Charged shot at the ledge, and here we go!
segments.original_text: 崖にチャージショットからこれは!

full_text: Alright, approaching with nair into a down tilt! Steadily racking up damage with forward tilt to push them out! Charged shot at the ledge, and here we go! Meteor!
